name: Thumbprint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix brown sugar, shortening, margarine, vanilla, and egg yolk in a medium bowl until smooth. Stir in flour and salt until the dough holds together. Shape into 1-inch balls. Beat the egg white slightly with a fork. Dip each ball into the egg white, then roll in nuts. Place about 1 inch apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. Press your thumb deeply into the center of each cookie. Bake for about 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Remove from the oven immediately and let cool completely on a wire rack. Fill the thumbprints with jelly.
Yield: 36 cookies.
